task_description: Add Amazon Bedrock as an additional LLM extraction endpoint type alongside the existing Ollama endpoint, using the Python SDK (boto3) to access Bedrock.

verification.summary: 434 tests pass (1 deselected is pre-existing failure). All 23 new bedrock tests pass. Tests cover config parsing, service initialization, mocked _call_bedrock with valid/invalid responses, think-block stripping, markdown fence extraction, and prompt verification. Docker build skipped (would require node_modules setup).
